entries.name: docker-build
entries.description: Build Docker images from Dockerfiles with multi-stage support

intent.when: user needs to build container images
intent.input: Dockerfile path or build context directory

usage: Run from the repository root or pass an explicit build context.
Tag the image before pushing to a registry.

entries.name: docker-compose
entries.description: Start Docker Compose services for local development environments

intent.when: user needs to start local development services
